name: Peaches and Cream Pie
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Peaches, peeled and sliced (5 medium)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prick pie shell with a fork.
3. Bake the pie shell for 10 minutes.
4. Cool the pie shell completely.
5. In a large bowl, combine sugar, flour, salt, nutmeg, and cinnamon.
6. Add the peaches and toss gently until combined.
7. Spoon the mixture into the pre-baked pie shell.
8. Pour whipping cream over the top of the filling.
9. Bake for 40-45 minutes, or until set.
10. Let cool to room temperature before serving.
11. Serve with additional whipping cream.
